name: Easy Cheesy Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients for the cake together; do not add any additional ingredients to the cake mix as per the box instructions. Pat into the bottom of a 13 x 9 pan.
2. Mix together the frosting mix, eggs, and cream cheese. Pour evenly over the cake batter and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
